{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163059225DE4203A8FE1DA4EE8"}"},"total":996},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7457199736157700889","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看的人越来越多了好像，火了之后作者大大会记住我吗[快哭了][快哭了][快哭了]
第二次追评：不知道为什么突然就不想看下去了，不是作者大大写的有点问题，可能是个人的原因，毕竟本人看书经常这样，突然就不想看一本书了，这本书真的很好看，很符合本人对风神的印象，文笔也是可以的，不知道什么时候才会重新追这本书，可能到那时候这本书已经完结了吧。先提前说一句再见了[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736269180,"group_id":"7436340949703216153","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3426492398975800"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436340949703216153","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"131"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13907,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":13},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7440327990284092185","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的真的很好！对于我感觉，真的很符合温迪的性格，作为一个温厨真的开心[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]希望作者可以更下去！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732339307,"group_id":"7436340949703216153","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这辈子与大蒜为敌！！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N61hZiZV5ER221kHCcFkFL7djtodKrRptgnV0LuhKEc1","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/713cbbb8b4f1459f9f5783074e80bab1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793320&x-signature=UL7SY8MySnhYwJLeqJv2FD%2FlziY%3D","user_id":"3426492398975800","user_name":"棉逸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3426492398975800","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1718704346,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436340949703216153","book_info":{"abstract":"一个温迪coser意外来到斩神世界。
得世界承认，以神之名陪众人走过了一段路程。
有欢有笑，有悲有伤。但是放心，风啊，会帮你吹散前路阴霾。
“你若困于无风之地，我便为你奏响高天之歌”
千秋的承诺最后也兑现了。
沧南神战，白袍兜帽的神明，风起战众神，风落引归魂。
微风拂面，且听风吟。
（ps：只是突然想到了的点子，激情产物，文笔不行，尽量忍受啊，全程不委屈，不隐藏，不升级，开局千秋无敌直至完结
pss：声明一点，咱们主角只是有了能力，甚至连扮演都不是，没有要求，所以出现与温迪人设不符的地方很正常，因为他本来就是自己，做与不做只是自己想不想。他是巴巴托斯，但不是温迪。
psss：15章情节设计可能不太好，可以跳过，不影响
pssss:前40章呈现效果没有后面好，觉得前面不好可以再往后看一看，要是实在忍不了请左上角退出）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7a83d605acad981da4843daf6d55fedb","author":"轻云朵儿","author_id":"","book_id":"7436340949703216153","book_name":"斩神成为风神为众人奏响高天之歌","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a8e0f8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7436341263411970585","read_count":"19937","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"286545"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"128","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9319bf90572967f41e170f637540c789~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438659&x-signature=3m5gpY%2Bugy2NirUZP4OGwSSk6uY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"767907478645924","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"28"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163059225DE4203A8FE1DA4EE8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读60分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":45,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3575,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":14055},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1736418249,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613408561580360510","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我必须给个超级好评，看过的同人文里面最好看了，没有和其他同人文一样那种直接把全部原主角要经历的事情群给改写了，就像文里面写的一样他是一楼带来转机的风，是一步步的布局让他们也能够经历那些成长是痛的，但是这才能体现他们的人生。他们都还是会经历那些痛，但是也是有这一楼风给他们带来奇迹和温暖！
真的很好看！！看过最好看的同人文！不像其他文一样让他们从来没有经历那些痛，虽然也很心疼但是这就是他们的人生。这楼风给他们带来了转机也没有一直的帮他们给他们全部的困难和痛苦扫除！这个文里面我看到的是他们真正的温暖的结局
我之前看过的同人文我看不到的他们不是真正的他们，这篇给他们写活了！我感觉文里面的他们很真实，让我感受到了他们真正的到了温暖人生也不在有哪些遗憾！
跪求跪求你们快去看[舔屏][舔屏][舔屏]我垃圾的语言表达能力表哒不出来啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772637499,"group_id":"7436340949703216153","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱看玄幻文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3jIp3NGJgU1Cega998TLec=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b44d86e0e2d34cba9eb37726c445a45e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793708&x-signature=tx1Lkz09yiUzXJGLFSbRNclnoiE%3D","user_id":"635992127843496","user_name":"俘栀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"635992127843496","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436340949703216153","book_info":{"abstract":"一个温迪coser意外来到斩神世界。
